catalyst.event: FY2025 full-year earnings release expected to confirm first full-year GAAP operating profit, with Tevimbra US/EU label expansion readouts (1L ESCC, 1L gastric IO+chemo) and BRUKINSA ex-US share data versus Calquence/Imbruvica
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-03-25 (±2 weeks) FY2025 results; Tevimbra label expansion decisions Q1-Q2 2026
catalyst.source: BeOne Medicines IR calendar; FDA/EMA action timelines; company 3Q25 guidance

rightIf_conditions: FY2025 reported GAAP operating income positive (>$0)
FY2026 consensus EPS revised upward by ≥20% within 60 days of FY2025 print
Tevimbra 1L gastric label expansion approval in EU by Q2 2026
wrongIf_conditions: FY2025 GAAP operating loss (any negative number) reported
BRUKINSA US quarterly revenue growth slows to <10% YoY for 2 consecutive quarters
Sonrotoclax Phase 3 CELESTIAL-TN-CLL primary endpoint miss
FDA Complete Response Letter on any pending Tevimbra label expansion
what_changes_our_mind: FY2025 results show GAAP operating loss (not profit) AND BRUKINSA US 4Q25 sequential growth <5% — would invalidate both the profitability inflection and the share-gain durability legs simultaneously.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes BeiGene is fairly valued on P/S → We believe FY2025 GAAP profitability inflection triggers buy-side category-flip re-rating → Mechanism is mandate-driven institutional inflows once profitability filter passes.
time_to_resolution: 12 months (FY2025 print March 2026 + 60-90 days for consensus revision)

quantification.metric_target: FY2025 GAAP operating margin and FY2026 consensus EPS revision
quantification.current_value: FY2024 GAAP operating margin -22%; FY2025E consensus EPS ~$0.50 ADR
quantification.predicted_value: FY2025 GAAP operating margin +3% to +5%; FY2026 EPS revised upward 25-40% post FY2025 print
